{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: General Manager - Doubletree

Job Identification: 216324
Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	As a General Manager at a DoubleTree property, you&rsquo;re not just leading hotel operations &ndash; you&rsquo;re spreading the light and warmth of hospitality by delivering memorable experiences that make the stay for every guest.


Responsibilities


	Lead with DoubleTree&rsquo;s commitment to dependable hospitality: &nbsp;Oversee all hotel operations to deliver warm, attentive, and thoughtful service&mdash;ensuring every guest experience is seamless, consistent, and reflective of the brand&rsquo;s high standards
	Drive performance and profitability: &nbsp;Manage revenue, budgets, and cost controls to achieve financial targets while balancing operational efficiency with innovative guest experiences
	Oversee property priorities: &nbsp;Lead capital projects, refurbishments, and service initiatives to maintain operational excellence and brand alignment
	Set and execute strategic direction: &nbsp;Shape short- and long-term goals, making decisions in the best interests of the hotel, the DoubleTree brand, and Hilton&rsquo;s long-term vision
	Inspire and develop talent: &nbsp;Provide visionary leadership to the executive team and all Team Members, embedding Hilton&rsquo;s values and fostering a team of passionate and creative professionals
	Strengthen communication and collaboration: &nbsp;Hold regular briefings with the Heads of Department (HOD) team and maintain strong relationships with owners, auditors, and Hilton stakeholders to ensure alignment and accountability
	Commit to continuous improvement: &nbsp;Uphold and exceed Hilton and DoubleTree&rsquo;s service standards, respond to audits proactively, and drive innovation and operational integrity across the business.


What It Takes to Make the Stay


	At Hilton, our core values define what it takes to succeed here and guide the qualities we look for in every team member:
	A passion for spreading the light and warmth of Hospitality. Acting with Integrity and always doing the right thing. Inspiring others through Leadership. A belief that Teamwork drives the best outcomes. A sense of Ownership and accountability. And a focus on the Now, bringing urgency and discipline to every moment, knowing it can make a lasting impact.


Requirements


	The ideal candidate is a strategic and hands-on leader, with a strong focus on owner relations, commercial performance, and operational excellence.&nbsp;
	To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:
	
		Degree or diploma in Hotel Management or equivalent&nbsp;
		Fluency in English (spoken and written).
		Proven experience as a General Manager in a full-service hotel environment&nbsp;
		Passion for delivering memorable guest experiences that reflect the brand promise&nbsp;
		A track record of driving innovative commercial growth, ideally with emerging or developing markets
		Strong business acumen in budget management, revenue forecasting, and strategic planning &nbsp;
		Experience operating in emerging markets, driving performance in predominantly domestic markets while developing local teams
		Highly visible leadership style that builds strong teams, partnerships, and networks&nbsp;
		Strong owner and stakeholder management, building trusted relationships
		Experience leading hotel openings, conversions, or repositioning initiatives is preferred
		Ability to establish and position a hotel as a leading market player&nbsp;
		Resilience, sound judgment, and the ability to balance strategic vision with operational execution.
	
	
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-22",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

General Manager Job at Hilton Worldwide




        
    

        
        Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: General Manager - Doubletree
     

            
    



Job Identification: 216324
Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	As a General Manager at a DoubleTree property, you’re not just leading hotel operations – you’re spreading the light and warmth of hospitality by delivering memorable experiences that make the stay for every guest.


Responsibilities


	Lead with DoubleTree’s commitment to dependable hospitality:  Oversee all hotel operations to deliver warm, attentive, and thoughtful service—ensuring every guest experience is seamless, consistent, and reflective of the brand’s high standards
	Drive performance and profitability:  Manage revenue, budgets, and cost controls to achieve financial targets while balancing operational efficiency with innovative guest experiences
	Oversee property priorities:  Lead capital projects, refurbishments, and service initiatives to maintain operational excellence and brand alignment
	Set and execute strategic direction:  Shape short- and long-term goals, making decisions in the best interests of the hotel, the DoubleTree brand, and Hilton’s long-term vision
	Inspire and develop talent:  Provide visionary leadership to the executive team and all Team Members, embedding Hilton’s values and fostering a team of passionate and creative professionals
	Strengthen communication and collaboration:  Hold regular briefings with the Heads of Department (HOD) team and maintain strong relationships with owners, auditors, and Hilton stakeholders to ensure alignment and accountability
	Commit to continuous improvement:  Uphold and exceed Hilton and DoubleTree’s service standards, respond to audits proactively, and drive innovation and operational integrity across the business.


What It Takes to Make the Stay


	At Hilton, our core values define what it takes to succeed here and guide the qualities we look for in every team member:
	A passion for spreading the light and warmth of Hospitality. Acting with Integrity and always doing the right thing. Inspiring others through Leadership. A belief that Teamwork drives the best outcomes. A sense of Ownership and accountability. And a focus on the Now, bringing urgency and discipline to every moment, knowing it can make a lasting impact.


Requirements


	The ideal candidate is a strategic and hands-on leader, with a strong focus on owner relations, commercial performance, and operational excellence. 
	To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:
	
		Degree or diploma in Hotel Management or equivalent 
		Fluency in English (spoken and written).
		Proven experience as a General Manager in a full-service hotel environment 
		Passion for delivering memorable guest experiences that reflect the brand promise 
		A track record of driving innovative commercial growth, ideally with emerging or developing markets
		Strong business acumen in budget management, revenue forecasting, and strategic planning  
		Experience operating in emerging markets, driving performance in predominantly domestic markets while developing local teams
		Highly visible leadership style that builds strong teams, partnerships, and networks 
		Strong owner and stakeholder management, building trusted relationships
		Experience leading hotel openings, conversions, or repositioning initiatives is preferred
		Ability to establish and position a hotel as a leading market player 
		Resilience, sound judgment, and the ability to balance strategic vision with operational execution.
	
	
    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Customer Experience Officer

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full Time

Job Description


	The customer experience officer will lead the design, measurement, and continuous improvement of customer journeys across Media Trust Group&rsquo;s digital platforms, ensuring that every audience interaction is seamless, engaging, and valuable.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and optimise customer journeys.
	Improve onboarding.
	Collect and analyse feedback.
	Monitor satisfaction metrics.
	Resolve experience pain points.
	Work with the Editorial, Product, and IT departments.
	Coordinate audience engagement.
	Support podcast audience growth.
	Recommend UX improvements.
	Develop customer communications.
	Produce monthly experience reports.
	Benchmark against industry best practice.


Required Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Education: Degree in a relevant field.
	Minimum of seven (7) years of experience in customer experience, digital products, or audience engagement.
	Media or digital business experience is an advantage.
	Customer journey mapping
	CRM systems
	Google Analytics
	Communication
	Analytical thinking
	Cross-functional collaboration

Customer Experience Officer Job at Media Trust Limited




        
    

        
        Media Trust Limited is the publisher of Daily Trust and other newspaper titles. They are also into commercial printing as well as Brand Marketing Research for the purpose of identifying new opportunities for business values. Each market research report delivers insight across a wide range of crucial factors such as market size, growth drivers, competitive landscape, trends, and forecasts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Customer Experience Officer

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full Time

Job Description
     

            
    




	The customer experience officer will lead the design, measurement, and continuous improvement of customer journeys across Media Trust Group’s digital platforms, ensuring that every audience interaction is seamless, engaging, and valuable.


Key Responsibilities


	Design and optimise customer journeys.
	Improve onboarding.
	Collect and analyse feedback.
	Monitor satisfaction metrics.
	Resolve experience pain points.
	Work with the Editorial, Product, and IT departments.
	Coordinate audience engagement.
	Support podcast audience growth.
	Recommend UX improvements.
	Develop customer communications.
	Produce monthly experience reports.
	Benchmark against industry best practice.


Required Qualifications & Skills


	Education: Degree in a relevant field.
	Minimum of seven (7) years of experience in customer experience, digital products, or audience engagement.
	Media or digital business experience is an advantage.
	Customer journey mapping
	CRM systems
	Google Analytics
	Communication
	Analytical thinking
	Cross-functional collaboration
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales Manager Job at Arab Space Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Arab Space Nigeria Limited is growing real estate company focused on property sales and real estate services.

We help individuals and investors access verified properties while promoting transparency, structure, and professionalism in real estate transactions.

Our work environment encourages learning, accountability, team work, and performance-based growth. Team members are given clear responsibilities, proper supervision, and opportunities to grow as the company expands.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos

Eligibility
To be considered for any of the roles above, applicants must:
     

            
    




	Have 3 - 5 years of relevant experience working with a commercial real estate company or marketing/selling luxury real estate properties in Lagos.
	Possess the minimum years of experience required for the role they are applying for.
	Currently reside on Lagos Island, Lagos State.
	Have the knowledge, skills, and professional attitude required to perform successfully in the role.

Accountant Job at Kimberly Apparel




        
    

        
        Kimberly Apparel is a premium, women-owned luxury fashion boutique and concierge service located in Lagos. The brand serves as a high-end hub for fashion enthusiasts looking for curated international styles and personal wardrobe management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirement
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should be passionate about fashion, creativity, and delivering exceptional service.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	We will not be accepting applications via Instagram or WhatsApp DMs.
	Applications received through direct messages will not be considered.
